<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Invalidate cache records and remove the database records"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/cachekey/invalidate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Takes a list of datasources, finds and invalidates the associated cache records and removes the database records.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
